query: SELECT id, agent_name, level, dominant_element, wuxing_wood, wuxing_fire, wuxing_earth, wuxing_metal, wuxing_water, max_hp, max_mp, attack, defense, speed, magic_attack FROM game_agents WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY level DESC LIMIT 20
